vt_requirements.note: Every acceptance criterion or truth-state-advancing claim must record these four V&T fields.

title: C-RSP Build Contract — TLC Workbench Surfaces
goal: Require TUI and Web UI to expose the same governed core lifecycle over one shared application layer.
objective: Ensure the Workbench treats both surfaces as first-class operator interfaces, with shared services, identical governance checks, and automated parity proof for all core mutations.
required_outputs: Launchable TUI and Web UI surfaces.
Ten core lifecycle flows available in both surfaces.
Shared lifecycle mutation services used by both surfaces.
Automated parity test evidence for the dual-surface flows.

acceptance_criteria.verification: Launch commands or tests prove the TUI and Web UI start successfully.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Both surfaces execute all ten core flows.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Automated flow coverage or equivalent tests exercise the ten required lifecycle operations.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Shared services are used by both surfaces for lifecycle mutation.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Mutation paths trace through src/app/services or equivalent shared domain services.

acceptance_criteria.statement: Automated parity tests prove equivalent outcomes for core flows.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Parity tests compare the resulting lifecycle, claim, and evidence state for both surfaces.

acceptance_criteria.statement: No core lifecycle mutation is implemented in only one surface.
acceptance_criteria.verification: Code review and test evidence show no surface-only bypass for governed mutations.

halt_conditions.trigger: The TUI lacks a required governed core flow.
halt_conditions.resolution: Implement the missing TUI flow and verify parity before merge.

halt_conditions.trigger: The Web UI lacks a required governed core flow.
halt_conditions.resolution: Implement the missing Web UI flow and verify parity before merge.

halt_conditions.trigger: A governed mutation is implemented surface-locally instead of through shared services.
halt_conditions.resolution: Move the mutation into shared services and re-run parity verification.

halt_conditions.trigger: Parity tests fail or are missing for a required core flow.
halt_conditions.resolution: Fix the parity regression and restore automated parity coverage.

evidence_requirements.description: Launch evidence for both the TUI and Web UI.
Parity evidence for the ten required core flows.
